response_sample.body:
Full evidence asset set for GitHub Actions run 24675942985.

Includes:
- imported GHA run artifacts and promotion report
- host evidence bundle, analytics, artifacts, repo evidence packages
- /tmp metatron run extracts and gha archives
- per-container docker logs, inspect output, and integration log directories for Zeek, Suricata, Falco, backend, and other running services

Notable baseline references included in the package:
- /home/byron/Downloads/seraph-evidence-bundle-2026-04-20 (521 platinum, 170 gold)
- current repo evidence-bundle and /tmp/metatron_evidence_bundle_24675942985 snapshots
